minor.message: 'FakeModelClient in CI mode produces fail-closed verdicts' test is tautological — builds its own JSON and parses it back rather than calling resolveModelClient() in CI mode + client.complete(); would not catch drift in the production FakeModelClient constructor arg.

suggestion.message: 'documents real e2e requires AI_SDLC_SANDBOX_INTEGRATION_TESTS=1' test is expect(true).toBe(true) — a comment block would suffice; inflates the test count.

minor.message: Tautological CI FakeModelClient test — does not call resolveModelClient(); cannot catch drift in the production constructor arg.
expect(true).toBe(true) doc-marker test inflates the 32-test count; keep as a comment block.

suggestion.message: Duplicate scenario of the unapproved-consensus test above it (same fixture, same assertion); replace with a distinct per-reviewer-rejection ordering case.
